history.content:
<thought>
I am at the upper-left area facing right. The goal is below and to the right, and the direct route to the right is blocked by lava immediately ahead, so I should move downward first to avoid it.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am near the left side of the map facing down, but the cell directly below is open and there is a clear path downward toward the goal in the lower-right area. The safest immediate move is to continue forward.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I’m at the left side of the map facing down. The goal is in the lower-right area, and the open route is to go down first, then across the open corridor, while avoiding lava. My next move is to turn right so I can head toward the open path.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am at the left side of the map facing left. The goal `O` is in the lower-right area. The cell directly in front of me is a wall, so I cannot move forward. I should turn to face down or up? To progress into the open corridor below, turning right will face down.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am at the left side of the map facing up (`^`). The goal `O` is far below and to the right, so I need to start moving downward. Turning right will make me face right first, which is not the shortest direction for progress here because the path directly below seems open. I will turn left to face left? Actually that is a wall, so I should instead turn right twice? No, from up to down requires two turns. I will take one turn right first to orient toward the open corridor and then proceed.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am at the left side of the map, facing right. The goal is near the lower-right area. The path ahead on my row is blocked by lava at the second cell, so I need to move downward first to route around it. Since I am facing right, turning right will make me face down.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am near the left side facing down. The goal is in the lower-right area, so I should move downward first, but there is a wall of lava blocking the direct path on this column. I need to head right along the open corridor, so I will turn left to face right.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>

<thought>
I am facing right and there is a clear open path to the goal by moving right and then down around the lava barrier. The immediate next step is to move forward.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>
